decisions.title: Contracts are the only normative source of truth
decisions.summary: All normative rules and structures must live in contracts/.

decisions.title: docs/ is generated team interface and archive only
decisions.summary: Human-facing docs are generated views or archival artifacts, never normative.

decisions.title: Drift is blocked by hard local guards
decisions.summary: generate --check, decision-guard, and hard-cutover-guard are mandatory local gates.
